description: Emitted by T85 ListingFeedGenerator. PAYLOAD IS COUNT-ONLY — no listing content, no seller identifiers, no pricing data. Full listing data is retrieved by consumers via direct DB lookup using feedId.

feedId.description: Opaque feed batch identifier — consumers use this to fetch listing content from DB

count.description: Number of listings in this feed batch

piiGuard: CRITICAL: No listing content, seller identifiers, or pricing data permitted in payload (arb-flow08-feed-payload-pii-safety). Consumers must fetch content via DB query using feedId.
arbiterRef: arb-flow08-feed-payload-pii-safety: payload contains { tenantId, feedId, count, generatedAt } ONLY.
